title: Explosive Christmas
description: Modpack for the yearly Christmas Minecraft Server of Explosion Gang ^^
body:
# Explosive Christmas
This is just a modpack for the yearly Christmas themed Minecraft Server for Explosion Gang!
We are just a small group of friends that play Minecraft yearly around Christmas, this Modpack features a small amount of mods for QoL changes or things like in-game voice chat.

This is mostly for my Friends but other people can play it too if you wanna ^^
